Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Assign RPO, RTO, retention, encryption, restore, and rebuild strategy separately to accounts, subscriptions, reader state, feeds, entries, raw evidence, and telemetry.

For Feed aggregation and Go Defend the Feed Go Data Class Recovery model · Theory Feed Go Data Class Re…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: All feed data can simply be fetched again after loss.
